title: Project Design Sync
preview: Discussion about the new design system and color palette...
transcript: In today's sync, we reviewed the design system progress. Alice recommended using more vibrant colors to appeal to Gen Z users. Bob agreed and said specifically that we should use a lush purple and deep blacks. We also decided that the initial prototype should be ready by this Friday. Charlie mentioned that we need to ensure the audio transcription is accurate for the EchoNote feature.
summary: The team discussed the design system, focusing on Gen Z aesthetics with lush purple and deep blacks. A prototype is due this Friday, and audio transcription accuracy was emphasized.
toneSummary: Focused and design-driven with clear next steps.
decisions: Use lush purple and deep blacks for the design system.
Deliver the initial prototype by Friday.
importantMoments: Alice suggesting vibrant colors to target Gen Z.
Bob agreeing on the specific lush purple and deep black palette.
